final_sql:
WITH youtube_visitors AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "visitorId"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."trafficSource") ts
  WHERE ts.value:"source" ILIKE '%YouTube%'
),
product_quantities AS (
  SELECT
    ts.value:"source" AS "source",
    SUM(t1."visitNumber") AS "total_quantity"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."trafficSource") ts
  WHERE ts.value:"source" NOT ILIKE '%YouTube%'
  AND t1."visitorId" IN (SELECT "visitorId" FROM youtube_visitors)
  GROUP BY ts.value:"source"
)
SELECT "source", "total_quantity"
FROM product_quantities
ORDER BY "total_quantity" DESC
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH monthly_conversion_rates AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime"::TIMESTAMP) AS month,
    COUNT(h.value:"pagePath") AS pageviews,
    SUM(h.value:"productRevenue") AS total_revenue
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170329 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"pagePath" ILIKE '%product-details%'
  AND DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime"::TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2017-03-31'
  GROUP BY month
)
SELECT
  month,
  pageviews,
  total_revenue,
  CASE WHEN pageviews > 0 THEN (total_revenue / pageviews) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS conversion_rate
FROM monthly_conversion_rates
ORDER BY month ASC;

final_sql:
WITH inventor_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(t1."publication_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS publication_year,
    COUNT(i.value:"field") AS inventor_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."inventor") i
  WHERE t1."publication_date" >= 19600101 AND t1."publication_date" <= 20201231
    AND t1."publication_number" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY publication_year
),
publication_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(t1."publication_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS publication_year,
    COUNT(t1."publication_number") AS total_patent_publications
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1
  WHERE t1."publication_date" >= 19600101 AND t1."publication_date" <= 20201231
    AND t1."publication_number" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY publication_year
)
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', ic.publication_year) - (YEAR(ic.publication_year) % 5) AS period,
  AVG(ic.inventor_count) AS avg_number_of_inventors,
  SUM(pc.total_patent_publications) AS total_patent_publications
FROM inventor_counts ic
JOIN publication_counts pc ON ic.publication_year = pc.publication_year
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -25.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH assignee_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(t1."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "year",
    a.value:"name"::STRING AS "assignee_name",
    COUNT(t1."application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."assignee") a
  WHERE t1."application_number" IS NOT NULL 
    AND t1."filing_date" >= 20170201 
    AND t1."application_kind" = 'A61'
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(t1."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')), a.value:"name"::STRING
),
max_assignee AS (
  SELECT "assignee_name", MAX("application_count") AS "max_count"
  FROM assignee_counts
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
)
SELECT ac."year", ac."assignee_name", ac."application_count"
FROM assignee_counts ac
JOIN max_assignee ma ON ac."assignee_name" = ma."assignee_name" AND ac."application_count" = ma."max_count"
ORDER BY ac."year" DESC
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed
